name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim after hurting my knee on the job in Idaho?

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim after hurting my knee on the job in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notify employer within 60 days, file claim within 1 year in Idaho.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: In Idaho, notify employer within 60 days and file formally within one year from injury or disability knowledge.[2] Delays risk losing benefits or proof issues.[2] Key factors: immediate reporting best; one-year statute for formal claim; exceptions rare for good cause.[2] Report now even if late, gather medical proof, consult lawyer for extensions or appeals.[3] Time-sensitive—act today.

description: Notify employer within 60 days, file claim within 1 year in Idaho.[2]
